name: PolyPoints2D
summary: The PolyPoints class is the base template class for all objects which store geometry as a vector of points (or another objects), specially for polyline, polygon and spline.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Remove all points from vector.
methods.remarks: Remove all points from vector.

methods.name: Count
methods.summary: Get count of points.
methods.remarks: Get count of points.

methods.name: Empty
methods.summary: Return true if no points, otherwise false.
methods.remarks: Return true if no points, otherwise false.

methods.name: EqualRef
methods.summary: Test if reference points are equal.
methods.remarks: Test if reference points are equal.

methods.name: GetEndPoint
methods.summary: Get the end point in world coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Get the end point in world coordinate system.

returns.doc: end point in world coordinate system

methods.name: GetEndRelPoint
methods.summary: Get the end point
methods.remarks: Get the end point

methods.name: GetLastPoint
methods.summary: Get the last point in world coordinate system, data.
methods.remarks: Get the last point in world coordinate system, data.

returns.doc: last point in world coordinate system

methods.name: GetPoint
methods.summary: Get point in world coordinate system, data. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.
methods.remarks: Get point in world coordinate system, data. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.

returns.doc: point point in world coordinate system.

methods.name: GetPointIndex
methods.summary: Get index of the given point
methods.remarks: Get index of the given point

returns.doc: tuple(True if a point was found, Found index)

methods.name: GetPointIndexes
methods.summary: Get indexes of the given point, in case that several points in the spline will have the same coordinates
methods.remarks: Get indexes of the given point, in case that several points in the spline will have the same coordinates

returns.doc: tuple(True if at least one point was found, Found indexes)

methods.name: GetRefPoint
methods.summary: Get reference point.
methods.remarks: Get reference point.

returns.doc: constant the reference point in the world coordinate system.

methods.name: GetRelPoint
methods.summary: Get point in Local coordinate system, no data. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.
methods.remarks: Get point in Local coordinate system, no data. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.

returns.doc: point constant the point at position index.

methods.name: GetStartPoint
methods.summary: Get the start point in world coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Get the start point in world coordinate system.

returns.doc: start point in world coordinate system

methods.name: GetStartRelPoint
methods.summary: Get the start point
methods.remarks: Get the start point

methods.name: Insert
methods.signature: Insert(polyPoints: PolyPoints2D, position: int = 18446744073709551615) -> bool | Insert(point: Point2D, position: int = 18446744073709551615) -> bool
methods.summary: Insert vector of points at specific position. If return false then points weren't inserted.
methods.remarks: Insert vector of points at specific position. If return false then points weren't inserted.

params.name: position
params.doc: position where points will be inserted.

methods.name: InsertRel
methods.summary: Insert relative point at specific position. Used local coordinates. If return false then points weren't Inserted.
methods.remarks: Insert relative point at specific position. Used local coordinates. If return false then points weren't Inserted.

params.name: position
params.doc: position where points will be inserted.

methods.name: Remove
methods.summary: Remove point from specific position. If return false then points weren't removed.
methods.remarks: Remove point from specific position. If return false then points weren't removed.

params.name: position
params.doc: position of point which will be removed.

methods.name: RemoveLastPoint
methods.summary: Remove the last point
methods.remarks: Remove the last point

methods.name: Reserve
methods.summary: Reserve container capacity
methods.remarks: Reserve container capacity

params.name: newCount
params.doc: Expected size of container [count of points]

methods.name: Resize
methods.summary: Specifies a new size for the points vector.
methods.remarks: Specifies a new size for the points vector.

params.name: newSize
params.doc: The new size of the points vector.

methods.name: Reverse
methods.summary: Reverse the point order
methods.remarks: Reverse the point order

methods.name: SetEndPoint
methods.summary: Set the end point in world coordinates
methods.remarks: Set the end point in world coordinates

methods.name: SetPoint
methods.summary: Set point at given position in world coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Set point at given position in world coordinate system.

params.name: point
params.doc: point in the world coordinate system.

params.name: index
params.doc: index of point which will be set

methods.name: SetRefPoint
methods.summary: Set reference point in world coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Set reference point in world coordinate system.

params.name: refPoint
params.doc: reference point in the world coordinate system.

methods.name: SetRelPoint
methods.summary: Set point at given position in relative coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Set point at given position in relative coordinate system.

params.name: point
params.doc: point in the relative coordinate system.

params.name: index
params.doc: index of point which will be set

methods.name: SetStartPoint
methods.summary: Set the start point in world coordinates
methods.remarks: Set the start point in world coordinates

methods.name: ToLineChain
methods.summary: Get polyline as a chain of lines composed from 2 points.
methods.remarks: Get polyline as a chain of lines composed from 2 points.

returns.doc: vector of lines composed from 2 points (start and end point of a line)

methods.name: __getitem__
methods.summary: Get point at position from index. Used world coordinates. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.
methods.remarks: Get point at position from index. Used world coordinates. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range.

methods.name: __iadd__
methods.summary: Add point in world coordinates.
methods.remarks: Add point in world coordinates.

methods.name: __mul__
methods.summary: 2D matrix transformation
methods.remarks: 2D matrix transformation

methods.name: __setitem__
methods.summary: Set point at position from index. Used world coordinates. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range. Args: index: Specified position pnt: Point
methods.remarks: Set point at position from index. Used world coordinates. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when index is out of range. Args: index: Specified position pnt: Point

properties.summary: Get the end point in world coordinate system.
